title: barleria arnottiana
intro: Barleria arnottiana, also known as the Blue Button Bush, is a flowering plant native to Sri Lanka, belonging to the Acanthaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to treat various health conditions such as fever, cough, and skin infections. The health benefits of Barleria arnottiana include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system. The plant is traditionally used to make herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, which are prepared by boiling the leaves in water to extract its medicinal compounds.
